
===== PATTERN: save as =====
matches: [25, 3362, 3383, 3605, 3606, 3617, 3675, 4030, 6576, 6578, 6587]

--- lines 19-37 (match 25) ---
19:     - Visual editing with Markdown kept underneath
20:     - WYSIWYG editing with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and maths
21:     - Supports inline and display LaTeX-style maths
22:     - Full-width single-document workspace on desktop
23:     - Hidden print/export renderer with selectable document styles
24:     - Autosaves drafts to browser storage
25:     - Download/export edited Markdown, rendered HTML, or print/save as PDF
26: 
27:     Notes:
28:     - Fully self-contained: no CDN, no server, no build step, and no internet required.
29:     - The editor runs locally in the browser.
30:     - Saving exports a new file rather than overwriting the original.
31:   -->

37:         displayMath: [['$$', '$$'], ['\\[', '\\]']],

--- lines 3599-3617 (match 3605) ---
3599:         <h3>Basic workflow</h3>
3600:         <ol>
3601:           <li>Use <strong>New</strong> to start from the built-in ScienceMD starter document.</li>
3602:           <li>Use <strong>Open</strong> to load a <code>.md</code> file.</li>
3603:           <li>Write in the visual editor, or switch to <strong>MD</strong> for exact Markdown source editing.</li>
3604:           <li>Choose a document style from the <strong>Output</strong> group.</li>
3605:           <li>Use <strong>Save</strong> or <strong>Save As</strong> to download your Markdown.</li>
3606:           <li>Use <strong>Print</strong> in the Output group to print or save as PDF.</li>
3607:         </ol>
3608:       </section>
3609: 
3610:       <section>
3611:         <h3>Top toolbar</h3>
3612:         <table>
3613:           <tr><th>Button</th><th>Meaning</th></tr>
3614:           <tr><td>New</td><td>Start a fresh ScienceMD starter document</td></tr>
3615:           <tr><td>Open</td><td>Open a Markdown file</td></tr>
3616:           <tr><td>Save</td><td>Save the current Markdown file</td></tr>
3617:           <tr><td>Save As</td><td>Save with a new filename or export rendered HTML</td></tr>

3601:           <li>Use <strong>New</strong> to start from the built-in ScienceMD starter document.</li>
3602:           <li>Use <strong>Open</strong> to load a <code>.md</code> file.</li>

3604:           <li>Choose a document style from the <strong>Output</strong> group.</li>

3619:           <tr><td>Redo</td><td>Restore the most recently undone change</td></tr>

--- lines 3669-3687 (match 3675) ---
3669:         <p>ScienceMD uses a full-width visual editor. A hidden renderer prepares styled print, PDF, and HTML output without taking up document workspace.</p>
3670:         <p>The word count and character count are shown in the bottom footer status bar.</p>
3671:       </section>
3672: 
3673:       <section>
3674:         <h3>Autosave warning</h3>
3675:         <p>Autosave is browser storage. It is useful as a safety net, but it is not the same as saving a file. Use <strong>Save</strong> or <strong>Save As</strong> to create a real Markdown file.</p>
3676:         <p>Embedded images keep their original file format and dimensions. ScienceMD only shortens them in the editor view; saved Markdown contains the full standard embedded image.</p>
3677:       </section>
3678:

4032:     function showToast(message) {
4033:       clearTimeout(toastTimer);
4034:       toast.textContent = message;
4035:       toast.classList.add('show');
4036:       toastTimer = setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2200);
4037:     }
4038: 
4039: 
4040:     function isFullscreenActive() {
4041:       return !!(document.fullscreenElement || document.webkitFullscreenElement);
4042:     }

--- lines 6570-6588 (match 6576) ---
6570:     }
6571: 
6572:     function getSaveAsOptions() {
6573:       const suggestedName = normaliseMarkdownFileName(currentFileName || 'science-draft.md');
6574: 
6575:       if (typeof HTMLDialogElement === 'undefined') {
6576:         const requestedName = prompt('Save as filename:', suggestedName);
6577:         if (requestedName === null) return Promise.resolve(null);
6578:         const asHtml = confirm('Save as rendered HTML instead of Markdown?');
6579:         return Promise.resolve({ fileName: requestedName, asHtml });
6580:       }
6581: 
6582:       return new Promise(resolve => {
6583:         const dialog = document.createElement('dialog');
6584:         dialog.className = 'save-as-dialog';
6585:         dialog.innerHTML = `
6586:           <form method="dialog" class="save-as-form">
6587:             <h3>Save As</h3>
6588:             <label class="save-as-field">

--- lines 6572-6590 (match 6578) ---
6572:     function getSaveAsOptions() {
6573:       const suggestedName = normaliseMarkdownFileName(currentFileName || 'science-draft.md');
6574: 
6575:       if (typeof HTMLDialogElement === 'undefined') {
6576:         const requestedName = prompt('Save as filename:', suggestedName);
6577:         if (requestedName === null) return Promise.resolve(null);
6578:         const asHtml = confirm('Save as rendered HTML instead of Markdown?');
6579:         return Promise.resolve({ fileName: requestedName, asHtml });
6580:       }
6581: 
6582:       return new Promise(resolve => {
6583:         const dialog = document.createElement('dialog');
6584:         dialog.className = 'save-as-dialog';
6585:         dialog.innerHTML = `
6586:           <form method="dialog" class="save-as-form">
6587:             <h3>Save As</h3>
6588:             <label class="save-as-field">
6589:               <span>Filename</span>
6590:               <input name="fileName" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(suggestedName)}" autocomplete="off">

--- lines 6581-6599 (match 6587) ---
6581: 
6582:       return new Promise(resolve => {
6583:         const dialog = document.createElement('dialog');
6584:         dialog.className = 'save-as-dialog';
6585:         dialog.innerHTML = `
6586:           <form method="dialog" class="save-as-form">
6587:             <h3>Save As</h3>
6588:             <label class="save-as-field">
6589:               <span>Filename</span>
6590:               <input name="fileName" type="text" value="${escapeHtml(suggestedName)}" autocomplete="off">
6591:             </label>
6592:             <label class="save-as-check">
6593:               <input name="asHtml" type="checkbox">
6594:               <span>Save rendered preview as HTML</span>
6595:             </label>
6596:             <p class="save-as-note">Leave unticked to save the Markdown source.</p>
6597:             <div class="save-as-actions">
6598:               <button value="cancel" formnovalidate>Cancel</button>
6599:               <button class="primary" value="save">Save</button>

matches: [23, 25, 30, 47, 3206, 3261, 3617, 3936, 4030, 6645, 6656, 6661, 6663, 6670, 6688, 6691, 6696, 6697, 6709, 6710, 6711, 6715, 6732]

--- lines 17-35 (match 23) ---
17:     Features:
18:     - Open/import .md files
19:     - Visual editing with Markdown kept underneath
20:     - WYSIWYG editing with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and maths
21:     - Supports inline and display LaTeX-style maths
22:     - Full-width single-document workspace on desktop
23:     - Hidden print/export renderer with selectable document styles
24:     - Autosaves drafts to browser storage
25:     - Download/export edited Markdown, rendered HTML, or print/save as PDF
26: 
27:     Notes:
28:     - Fully self-contained: no CDN, no server, no build step, and no internet required.
29:     - The editor runs locally in the browser.
30:     - Saving exports a new file rather than overwriting the original.
31:   -->
32:   <!-- MathJax 3.2.1 | Apache License 2.0 | Includes Speech Rule Engine 4.0.6 and Wicked Good XPath 1.3.0. -->
33:   <script>
34:     window.MathJax = {
35:       tex: {

6663:       // embedded MathJax library. The main app script is deliberately not exported.

6669: 
6670:     function buildUntypesetPreviewHtmlForExport() {
6671:       // Build from the Markdown source rather than from preview.innerHTML.
6672:       // preview.innerHTML may contain MathJax's live DOM, which is not reliable
6673:       // when copied into a standalone saved HTML file on Android/Chrome.
6674:       const raw = expandEmbeddedImages(editor.value);
6675:       const { protectedText, blocks, inlines } = protectMath(raw);
6676:       const temp = document.createElement('article');
6677:       temp.innerHTML = sanitiseRenderedHtml(simpleMarkdownToHtml(protectedText));
6678:       restoreMath(temp, blocks, inlines);
6679:       markSubmissionStructure(temp);
6680:       return temp.innerHTML;
6681:     }

12:   <!--
13:     ScienceMD — self-contained Markdown + LaTeX-style maths editor
14:     --------------------------------------------------------------
15:     This is a single-page browser app. It does not need a server.

--- lines 19-37 (match 25) ---
19:     - Visual editing with Markdown kept underneath
20:     - WYSIWYG editing with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and maths
21:     - Supports inline and display LaTeX-style maths
22:     - Full-width single-document workspace on desktop
23:     - Hidden print/export renderer with selectable document styles
24:     - Autosaves drafts to browser storage
25:     - Download/export edited Markdown, rendered HTML, or print/save as PDF
26: 
27:     Notes:
28:     - Fully self-contained: no CDN, no server, no build step, and no internet required.
29:     - The editor runs locally in the browser.
30:     - Saving exports a new file rather than overwriting the original.
31:   -->

3664:         <p>In the visual editor, click a rendered formula to edit its LaTeX source, then click <strong>Done</strong> to re-render it.</p>

3666: 
3667:       <section>
3668:         <h3>Desktop layout</h3>
3669:         <p>ScienceMD uses a full-width visual editor. A hidden renderer prepares styled print, PDF, and HTML output without taking up document workspace.</p>
3670:         <p>The word count and character count are shown in the bottom footer status bar.</p>
3671:       </section>
3672: 
3673:       <section>
3674:         <h3>Autosave warning</h3>
3675:         <p>Autosave is browser storage. It is useful as a safety net, but it is not the same as saving a file. Use <strong>Save</strong> or <strong>Save As</strong> to create a real Markdown file.</p>
3676:         <p>Embedded images keep their original file format and dimensions. ScienceMD only shortens them in the editor view; saved Markdown contains the full standard embedded image.</p>
3677:       </section>

4031: 
4032:     function showToast(message) {
4033:       clearTimeout(toastTimer);
4034:       toast.textContent = message;
4035:       toast.classList.add('show');
4036:       toastTimer = setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2200);
4037:     }

4039: 
4040:     function isFullscreenActive() {
4041:       return !!(document.fullscreenElement || document.webkitFullscreenElement);
4042:     }

4416: 
4417:     function escapeHtml(value) {
4418:       return value
4419:         .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
4420:         .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
4421:         .replaceAll('>', '&gt;')
4422:         .replaceAll('"', '&quot;')
4423:         .replaceAll("'", '&#039;');
4424:     }
4425: 
4426:     function escapeAttribute(value) {
4427:       return escapeHtml(String(value || ''));
4428:     }
4429: 

--- lines 4421-4439 (match 4427) ---
4421:         .replaceAll('>', '&gt;')
4422:         .replaceAll('"', '&quot;')
4423:         .replaceAll("'", '&#039;');
4424:     }
4425: 
4426:     function escapeAttribute(value) {
4427:       return escapeHtml(String(value || ''));
4428:     }

4430:     function getHeadings(markdown) {
4431:       const headings = [];
4432:       const lines = markdown.split(/\r?\n/);
4433:       let offset = 0;
4434:       let inFence = false;
4435: 
4436:       for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
4437:         const line = lines[i];
4438: 
4439:         if (/^\s*```/.test(line) || /^\s*~~~/.test(line)) {

4469: 
4470:       const headings = getHeadings(editor.value);
4471: 
4472:       if (!headings.length) {
4473:         navList.innerHTML = '<div class="nav-empty">No Markdown headings found. Use headings like <strong># Abstract</strong> or <strong>## 1. Introduction</strong>.</div>';
4474:         return;
4475:       }
4476: 
4477:       navList.innerHTML = headings.map((heading, index) => {
4478:         heading.navIndex = index;
4479:         const title = escapeHtml(heading.title);
4480:         return `<button class="nav-item nav-level-${heading.level}" type="button" data-heading-index="${index}">${title}<br><span class="status">Line ${heading.line}</span></button>`;
4481:       }).join('');
4482: 
4483:       navList.querySelectorAll('[data-heading-index]').forEach(button => {

4485:           const heading = headings[Number(button.getAttribute('data-heading-index'))];

4956:     function isPageBreakHtml(value) {
4957:       const raw = String(value || '').trim();
4958:       if (/^<!--\s*(?:page\s*break|pagebreak|pb)\s*-->$/i.test(raw)) return true;
4959:       if (/class\s*=\s*['"][^'"]*(?:page-break|pagebreak|wysiwygmd-page-break|marktex-page-break)[^'"]*['"]/i.test(raw)) return true;
4960:       if (/style\s*=\s*['"][^'"]*(?:page-break-before\s*:\s*always|break-before\s*:\s*page|page-break-after\s*:\s*always|break-after\s*:\s*page)[^'"]*['"]/i.test(raw)) return true;

--- lines 4950-4968 (match 4956) ---
4950:       'width', 'height', 'max-width', 'min-width', 'color', 'background-color',
4951:       'font-size', 'font-weight', 'font-style', 'text-decoration', 'vertical-align',
4952:       'margin', 'margin-left', 'margin-right', 'margin-top', 'margin-bottom',
4953:       'padding', 'padding-left', 'padding-right', 'padding-top', 'padding-bottom'
4954:     ]);
4955: 
4956:     function isPageBreakHtml(value) {
4957:       const raw = String(value || '').trim();
4958:       if (/^<!--\s*(?:page\s*break|pagebreak|pb)\s*-->$/i.test(raw)) return true;
4959:       if (/class\s*=\s*['"][^'"]*(?:page-break|pagebreak|wysiwygmd-page-break|marktex-page-break)[^'"]*['"]/i.test(raw)) return true;
4960:       if (/style\s*=\s*['"][^'"]*(?:page-break-before\s*:\s*always|break-before\s*:\s*page|page-break-after\s*:\s*always|break-after\s*:\s*page)[^'"]*['"]/i.test(raw)) return true;
4961:       return false;
4962:     }
4963: 
4964:     function cleanAllowedStyles(root) {
4965:       root.querySelectorAll('[style]').forEach(node => {
4966:         const declarations = String(node.getAttribute('style') || '').split(';');
4967:         const safe = [];
4968:         declarations.forEach(part => {

--- lines 4967-4985 (match 4973) ---
4967:         const safe = [];
4968:         declarations.forEach(part => {
4969:           const pieces = part.split(':');
4970:           if (pieces.length < 2) return;
4971:           const prop = pieces.shift().trim().toLowerCase();
4972:           const value = pieces.join(':').trim();
4973:           if (!HTML_COMPAT_ALLOWED_STYLES.has(prop)) return;
4974:           if (/url\s*\(|expression\s*\(|javascript\s*:|@import|behavior\s*:/i.test(value)) return;
4975:           safe.push(`${prop}: ${value}`);
4976:         });
4977:         if (safe.length) node.setAttribute('style', safe.join('; '));
4978:         else node.removeAttribute('style');
4979:       });
4980:     }
4981:

4983:       const wrapper = document.createElement('template');
4984:       wrapper.innerHTML = html;
4985: 

--- lines 4976-4994 (match 4982) ---
4976:         });
4977:         if (safe.length) node.setAttribute('style', safe.join('; '));
4978:         else node.removeAttribute('style');
4979:       });
4980:     }
4981: 
4982:     function normaliseSanitisedHtml(html) {
4983:       const wrapper = document.createElement('template');
4984:       wrapper.innerHTML = html;
4985: 
4986:       wrapper.content.querySelectorAll('a[href]').forEach(link => {
4987:         const href = safeUrl(link.getAttribute('href'));
4988:         if (!href) link.removeAttribute('href');
4989:         else {
4990:           link.setAttribute('href', href);
4991:           link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
4992:           if (!link.getAttribute('target')) link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
4993:         }
4994:       });

--- lines 4978-4996 (match 4984) ---
4978:         else node.removeAttribute('style');
4979:       });
4980:     }

4993:         }

5037:     function protectInlineHtml(value) {
5038:       const htmlParts = [];
5039:       const stashHtml = fragment => {
5040:         const clean = sanitiseHtmlFragment(fragment);
5041:         if (!clean) return escapeHtml(fragment);
5042:         const index = htmlParts.length;
5043:         htmlParts.push(clean);
5044:         return `\uE002HTMLPART${index}\uE002`;
5045:       };
5046:       let text = String(value || '');
5047:       text = text.replace(/<!--\s*(?:page\s*break|pagebreak|pb)\s*-->/gi, match => stashHtml(match));
5048:       text = text.replace(/<\/?(?:a|abbr|b|br|cite|code|del|dfn|em|i|img|kbd|mark|s|samp|small|span|strong|sub|sup|u|var)(?:\s+[^<>]*?)?\s*\/?>/gi, match => stashHtml(match));

--- lines 19-37 (match 25) ---
19:     - Visual editing with Markdown kept underneath
20:     - WYSIWYG editing with headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and maths
21:     - Supports inline and display LaTeX-style maths
22:     - Full-width single-document workspace on desktop
23:     - Hidden print/export renderer with selectable document styles
24:     - Autosaves drafts to browser storage
25:     - Download/export edited Markdown, rendered HTML, or print/save as PDF
26: 
27:     Notes:
28:     - Fully self-contained: no CDN, no server, no build step, and no internet required.
29:     - The editor runs locally in the browser.
30:     - Saving exports a new file rather than overwriting the original.
31:   -->

--- lines 3599-3617 (match 3605) ---
3599:         <h3>Basic workflow</h3>
3600:         <ol>
3601:           <li>Use <strong>New</strong> to start from the built-in ScienceMD starter document.</li>
3602:           <li>Use <strong>Open</strong> to load a <code>.md</code> file.</li>
3603:           <li>Write in the visual editor, or switch to <strong>MD</strong> for exact Markdown source editing.</li>
3604:           <li>Choose a document style from the <strong>Output</strong> group.</li>
3605:           <li>Use <strong>Save</strong> or <strong>Save As</strong> to download your Markdown.</li>
3606:           <li>Use <strong>Print</strong> in the Output group to print or save as PDF.</li>
3607:         </ol>

4032:     function showToast(message) {
4033:       clearTimeout(toastTimer);
4034:       toast.textContent = message;
4035:       toast.classList.add('show');
4036:       toastTimer = setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 2200);

4040:     function isFullscreenActive() {
4041:       return !!(document.fullscreenElement || document.webkitFullscreenElement);

--- lines 6476-6494 (match 6482) ---
6476:     function getDocumentTitleFromMarkdown() {
6477:       const match = /^#\s+(.+?)\s*#*\s*$/m.exec(editor.value || '');
6478:       const title = match ? match[1].replace(/[`*_~\[\]()`]/g, '').trim() : '';
6479:       return title || (currentFileName || 'ScienceMD document').replace(/\.(markdown|md|txt|html?)$/i, '');
6480:     }
6481: 
6482:     function downloadTextFile(text, fileName, type) {
6483:       const blob = new Blob([text], { type });
6484:       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
6485:       const a = document.createElement('a');
6486: 
6487:       a.href = url;
6488:       a.download = fileName;
6489:       document.body.appendChild(a);
6490:       a.click();
6491:       a.remove();
6492:       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
6493:     }
6494:

6485:       const a = document.createElement('a');
6486: 
6487:       a.href = url;
6488:       a.download = fileName;
6489:       document.body.appendChild(a);
6490:       a.click();
6491:       a.remove();
6492:       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
6493:     }

6560:     function downloadMarkdown(fileNameOverride = null) {
6561:       if (isVisualModeActive()) {
6562:         const committedMath = commitActiveWysiwygMathEdit({ quiet: true });
6563:         if (!committedMath) syncMarkdownFromWysiwyg();
6564:       }
6565:       const text = expandEmbeddedImages(editor.value);
6566:       const safeName = normaliseMarkdownFileName(fileNameOverride || currentFileName || 'science-draft.md');
6567:       downloadTextFile(text, safeName, 'text/markdown;charset=utf-8');
6568:       setFileName(safeName);
6569:       showToast(`Saved ${safeName}`);
6570:     }
6571: 
6572:     function getSaveAsOptions() {

6574:

6577:         if (requestedName === null) return Promise.resolve(null);
6578:         const asHtml = confirm('Save as rendered HTML instead of Markdown?');

6750:         await downloadRenderedHtml(options.fileName);
6751:         return;
6752:       }
6753: 
6754:       downloadMarkdown(options.fileName);
6755:     }

6760:       if (!confirmed) return;

6757: 
6758:     function clearDraft() {
6759:       const confirmed = confirm('Start a new document from the built-in ScienceMD starter? This will replace the current editor text, but it will not delete any files from your device.');
6760:       if (!confirmed) return;
6761: 
6762:       // Treat New exactly like loading another file. On mobile browsers and
6763:       // Android WebView, a delayed contenteditable/keyboard event can otherwise
6764:       // write the previous visual document back over the starter text.
6765:       documentLoadInProgress = true;
6766:       clearTimeout(renderTimer);

===== PATTERN: createObjectURL =====
matches: [6484]

--- lines 6478-6496 (match 6484) ---
6478:       const title = match ? match[1].replace(/[`*_~\[\]()`]/g, '').trim() : '';
6479:       return title || (currentFileName || 'ScienceMD document').replace(/\.(markdown|md|txt|html?)$/i, '');
6480:     }
6481: 
6482:     function downloadTextFile(text, fileName, type) {
6483:       const blob = new Blob([text], { type });
6484:       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
6485:       const a = document.createElement('a');
6486: 
6487:       a.href = url;
6488:       a.download = fileName;
6489:       document.body.appendChild(a);
6490:       a.click();
6491:       a.remove();
6492:       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
6493:     }
6494: 
6495: 
6496:

matches: [6483]

--- lines 6477-6495 (match 6483) ---
6477:       const match = /^#\s+(.+?)\s*#*\s*$/m.exec(editor.value || '');
6478:       const title = match ? match[1].replace(/[`*_~\[\]()`]/g, '').trim() : '';
6479:       return title || (currentFileName || 'ScienceMD document').replace(/\.(markdown|md|txt|html?)$/i, '');
6480:     }
6481: 
6482:     function downloadTextFile(text, fileName, type) {
6483:       const blob = new Blob([text], { type });
6484:       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
6485:       const a = document.createElement('a');
6486: 
6487:       a.href = url;
6488:       a.download = fileName;
6489:       document.body.appendChild(a);
6490:       a.click();
6491:       a.remove();
6492:       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
6493:     }
